_note: ITR-verified F&O figures. INR. Net = Gross − Charges. Year-AGNOSTIC keys: `verified` = the last ITR-filed FY, `current` = the live FY (a frozen YTD seed; app/page.js adds daily increments from data/fno-ledger.json after `seedThrough` — do NOT hand-update `current` mid-year or you'll double-count). Display year names come from `labels` only. Annual ritual at ITR: move `current` → `verified`, roll `labels`, reset `current` to a fresh 0 seed with a new `seedThrough`, archive the ledger. Broker-wise per-FY realized (incl. all-time) is corroborated by data/broker-tax.json (parser-derived, GROSS). CF reconciled to the 3-year tax model.

current.label: Dhan F&O

cf.nonSpecSub: Sec 72 · 8-yr · offsets future F&O profit only
cf.stcgNote: ₹4,700 brought-forward STCG loss was fully consumed against FY25-26 short-term gains — nil carried into FY26-27.
cf.equityBlock: The ₹5.97L F&O + speculative loss pool can only offset future F&O / intraday profit — never capital gains. New gains here are taxed in full.

cgVerified.indianStcgNote: STT-paid delivery · Sec 111A @20% · fully absorbed in-year vs F&O loss (s71)
cgVerified.foreignStcgNote: Slab rate · US shares held <24m · Sch CG + Sch FSI

cfNote: FY25-26 F&O resulted in a net loss (−₹12,619) — set off in-year vs STCG/OS (s71), so it was NOT added to the pool. The ₹5,97,318 pool (non-spec ₹5,13,011 + speculative ₹84,307) enters FY26-27 intact; the ₹4,700 STCG loss was consumed against FY25-26 short-term gains. FY26-27 YTD realised F&O (+₹1,46,837) is absorbing the non-spec CF first (oldest AY2024-25 tranche). Speculative CF absorbs only intraday profit — not credit spread or stock F&O income.
